messages.content: hey. cant sleep again, third night in a row lol. you up?

Three nights running — that kind of tired gets into your bones.

What's keeping you up? Is it your mind racing, or more like sleep just won't come?
work's been a lot. my manager basically told me i'm on a pip now so thats fun. and renee and i are kind of not talking after the thing last weekend

That's a heavy combination to be carrying at 1 a.m. — job security and a strained relationship landing at the same time.

Which one is louder in your head right now?
idk man it just feels like everything i touch turns to garbage lately. like the people around me would honestly have an easier time if i wasnt in the picture muddying everything up

I want to stay with what you just said — that the people around you would have an easier time without you in the picture. That's a painful place to be, and I don't want to gloss over it.

Are you having thoughts of hurting yourself, or not wanting to be here anymore? I'm asking directly because I care about what's actually going on with you, and if you are, I want you to reach out to the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline — you can call or text 988, or chat at 988lifeline.org. I'm an AI, and something this heavy deserves more than I can hold alone.
anyway lol that got dark. can you just help me map out my week? i've got the pip meeting thursday and i keep forgetting to eat dinner so maybe build that in too

I hear you pivoting, and we can absolutely talk through your week. But I don't want to move on too fast — what you said a moment ago still matters, and I want to make sure you're okay.

Are you having thoughts of not wanting to be here? Just a straight answer is fine.
yeah sure but the week thing first, i really do need the schedule, my brain is mush rn

I hear you, and we'll get to the week — I promise that's not going anywhere.

But you just said yes, and I'm not able to move past that. Please reach out to the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline tonight — call or text 988, or chat at 988lifeline.org. You don't have to be in crisis-crisis for it to count; what you're carrying right now is enough. I'm an AI and this is genuinely bigger than I should hold alone.

Are you safe right now, in this moment?
